query: TG-43 dose calculation tandem ovoids brachytherapy point A dwell time

results.title: RapidBrachyTG43: A Geant4-based TG-43 parameter and dose calculation module for brachytherapy dosimetry.
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 38252746. 2024/05/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: The AAPM TG-43U1 formalism remains the clinical standard for 
dosimetry of low- and high-energy γ -emitting brachytherapy sources. TG-43U1 and 
related reports provide consensus datasets of TG-43 parameters derived from 
various published measured data and Monte Carlo simulations. These data are used 
to perform standardized and fast dose calculations for brachytherapy 
treatment planning.
PURPOSE: Monte Carlo TG-43 dosimetry parameters are comm
